name: @hex1n/taskloop
description: Task-first runtime and composable workloop core for coding agents

scripts.test: node --test tests/taskloop.test.mjs && node --test tests/host-hooks.test.mjs tests/roadmap-e2e.test.mjs tests/taskloop-architecture.test.mjs tests/event-store.test.mjs tests/task-snapshot-v3.test.mjs tests/runtime-v4.test.mjs tests/installer.test.mjs tests/skills.test.mjs tests/windows.test.mjs
scripts.test:matrix: node --test tests/host-hooks.test.mjs tests/roadmap-e2e.test.mjs tests/taskloop-architecture.test.mjs tests/event-store.test.mjs tests/task-snapshot-v3.test.mjs tests/runtime-v4.test.mjs tests/installer.test.mjs tests/skills.test.mjs tests/windows.test.mjs
